title: taraxacum intermedium
intro: Taraxacum intermedium, also known as intermediate dandelion, is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family, belonging to the same genus as the common dandelion. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects, which help to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Taraxacum intermedium include its ability to support liver function, lower blood pressure, and act as a natural antioxidant. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
